title: RPM: cleanup gobuild macro for CentOS Stream
body: The default gobuild macro on CentOS Stream now accounts for `BUILDTAGS`, so we don't need to redefine the macro in rpm spec.

comments.body: The `builder-live.log.gz` files in the [copr builds](https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/packit/containers-skopeo-2501/build/8562681/) show BUILDTAGS set in spec are used by gobuild.
